title: Senior Facilities Technician
description:
Senior Facilities Technician supports uninterrupted support in maintaining supply of electricity, compressed air, air-conditioning systems, sustainability and EHS initiatives

You will report to senior facilities supervisor based in Singapore.

Your responsibilities:

1. Maintaining Sustainability Initiatives, maintaining data for FTDM database

2. Perform PLC programming and control wiring for automation of facilities equipment.

3. Performing maintenance duties such as, trouble shooting of the Electrical Distribution Boards supporting the Labs / production lines, install electrical power point, supporting the project work.

4. Supervise contractors on facilities and equipment repairs.

5. Preparation and Documentation for ISO14001, 45001 & 9001 audits

6. Prepare and maintain AUTOCAD drawings for facilities projects

Qualifications:

  • Minimum Diploma in electrical and electronics engineering/ related
  • You can Work on shift basis or normal shift
  • Location: West. Transport pick up available Jurong East/Lakeside MRT stations

What We Offer:

Our benefits package includes …

  • Comprehensive mindfulness programmes with a premium membership to Calm
  • Volunteer Paid Time off available after 6 months of employment for eligible employees
  • Company volunteer and donation matching programme – The company matches your volunteer hours or personal cash donations to an eligible charity with a charitable donation.
  • Employee Assistance Program
  • Personalised wellbeing programmes through our OnTrack program
  • On-demand digital course library for professional development

... and other local benefits!

#LI-Hybrid #LI-NC1

At Rockwell Automation, we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive, and authentic workplace. If you're excited about this role but your experience doesn't align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right person for this or other roles.

postedCompany.description:
Rockwell Automation Introduction


Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK), is a global leader in industrial automation and digital transformation. We connect the imaginations of people with the potential of technology to expand what is humanly possible, making the world more productive and more sustainable. Headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, Rockwell Automation employs approximately 23,000 problem solvers dedicated to our customers in more than 100 countries. To learn more about how we are bringing The Connected Enterprise to life across industrial enterprises, visit www.rockwellautomation.com.
